arts.ttl: Leeds United sent clear promotion message by Sheffield United ahead of Swansea City clash
arts.sum: The Whites are now three points behind their promotion rivals in second place going into their clash against Swansea at the weekend. Leeds United's task going into their return to Championship action just became much clearer after a result from their promotion rivals.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd beat Coventry to take top spot - and put pressure back on Leeds
arts.sum: Sheffield United returned to the top of the Championship on Friday night after a superb 3-1 win over Frank Lampard's in-form Coventry.

arts.ttl: Leeds to consider Aaronson transfer offers
arts.sum: Leeds United are going to be assessing the entirety of their squad during the summer window, and that includes weighing up potential offers for Brenden Aaronson . Report: Leeds said to be considering offers for Brenden Aaronson this summer

arts.ttl: Crysencio Summerville and Archie Gray show true colours as ex-Leeds United prospect makes big call
arts.sum: Archie Gray and Crysencio Summerville have both sent messages to former Leeds United youngster Morten Spencer following his retirement from football at the age of just 21. Summerville, who left the Whites to join West Ham United in a £25m deal last summer, shared his thoughts with Spencer as he commented on his post with a red heart emoji and a praying hands emoji.

arts.ttl: Leeds’ Alfie Cresswell scores stunner v Man Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21s were pegged back by Manchester United at Thorp Arch on Friday afternoon, seeing their two goal lead vanish in four second half minutes. Alfie Cresswell scores stunner, Harry Gray strikes v Manchester United

arts.ttl: Former Nottingham Forest and West Ham man sheds light on failed Leeds United transfer
arts.sum: Without specifically naming United in comments covered by Senegal publication WIW Sport, Kouyate told TFM show Quartier Général: “ I was informed on a Friday that I was injured during the medical. Ultimately, no deal materialised for Kouyate and United opted to bring in Joshua Guilavogu to boost their midfield options following injuries in quick succession to Ethan Ampadu and Ilia Gruev.

arts.ttl: LUFC U21 2-2 MUFC U21: Spurs man’s trial, Gray scores
arts.sum: The encounter with Man United was as hectic as one would presume, with Leeds taking a 2-0 lead into half-time thanks to goals from Alfie Cresswell and Harry Gray. Leeds United U21 faced Manchester United this afternoon in the PL2, in which the Whites had a Tottenham defender on trial.

arts.ttl: Match summary: Leeds U21 2 Man Utd U21 2
arts.sum: It provided a real shot of adrenaline to United with Moorhouse soon testing Mahady again, and Mather firing narrowly off target from the rebound. After a number of corners, one was only half cleared to Kone, who produced a textbook left-volley flew that flew past Mahady.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard fires Sheffield United warning as Leeds United's Championship promotion battle heats up
arts.sum: Lampard would go on to namedrop Leeds United, the Blades and Burnley as the sides his Coventry team have been able to keep up with in the form table since his arrival. He added: “This is the business part of the season and fortunately we’ve managed to compete with the form of Sheffield United and the Leeds and Burnley since I’ve been in, particularly since the New Year.

arts.ttl: Leeds United living to regret decision to offload 22-year-old last summer: Opinion
